CustomField.description: This field is used to calculate the expiration days for the record.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Valid_Until__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Manual_Review_Requested_On__c)) ), IF( Valid_Until__c < Manual_Review_Requested_On__c, TODAY() - Valid_Until__c, TODAY() - Manual_Review_Requested_On__c ), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Valid_Until__c)), TODAY() - Valid_Until__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Manual_Review_Requested_On__c )), TODAY() - Manual_Review_Requested_On__c , 0 ) ) )
CustomField.label: Expiration Days
